children.name: IngestData
children.purpose: Read raw data from source, parse records, store in raw_data, and log ingestion
children.behavior: Based on source type (csv/json/api), read and parse records, store in raw_data, log step with counts

global_vars.description: Write parsed records to raw_data store
Log ingestion step with timestamp, records_in, records_out, errors

constraints.description: Must parse all records without exception; malformed records logged as errors

acceptance_criteria.description: raw_data contains all parsed records after execution
pipeline_log contains an ingest entry with correct counts

children.name: TransformData
children.purpose: Apply transformation rules to raw_data, store in processed_data, skip malformed records
children.behavior: Read raw_data, apply each rule to each record, skip and log malformed records, store result in processed_data
children.signature: def TransformData(pipeline_request: dict, raw_data: list) -> dict

global_vars.description: Read raw records from raw_data store
Write transformed records to processed_data store
Log transform step with timestamp, records_in, records_out, errors

constraints.description: Malformed records must be skipped, not cause failure

acceptance_criteria.description: processed_data contains all valid transformed records
pipeline_log contains a transform entry with correct counts

children.name: ValidateData
children.purpose: Check processed_data against quality rules, mark invalid records, produce quality_score
children.behavior: Read processed_data, apply quality rules to each record, compute quality_score, mark invalid records, store result
children.signature: def ValidateData(pipeline_request: dict, processed_data: list) -> dict

global_vars.description: Read processed_data, update records with quality_score and validity flags
Log validation step with timestamp, records_in, records_out, errors

data_operations.description: Read and update records with quality metadata

constraints.description: All records must be checked; quality_score computed for each

acceptance_criteria.description: Each record in processed_data has quality_score and validity flag
pipeline_log contains a validate entry with correct counts

children.name: ExportData
children.purpose: Format validated records as output, include only records that passed validation, log export
children.behavior: Read processed_data, filter to only validated records, format as csv or json, log export
children.signature: def ExportData(pipeline_request: dict, processed_data: list) -> dict

global_vars.description: Read processed_data to filter validated records
Log export step with timestamp, records_in, records_out, errors

constraints.description: Only records with quality_score above threshold are included in output

acceptance_criteria.description: pipeline_log contains an export entry with correct counts

governance_notes: Parent global state conservation verified: raw_data (read_write) covered by IngestData(write) + TransformData(read); processed_data (read_write) covered by TransformData(write) + ValidateData(read_write) + ExportData(read); pipeline_log (read_write) covered by all children (write). No parent operation dropped.
